rationale: Keep this pair because the cited paper’s core construct (hedonic vs. utilitarian goods and shifts in salience/weighting) directly overlaps with a central moderator in the citing paper (its Experiment 2 boundary condition on utilitarian vs. hedonic product type). The citing note explicitly says it links effects to prior work on product-type salience shifts, and the DOI match confirms this exact paper is in its references, so this is plausibly more than an incidental mention.
